notes: v1.6.96 — GUIDED PATH (smart empty states, never a wizard). A new user landed in silence: empty tabs, no pointer to the next step. The app now reads its own state and surfaces exactly ONE state-gated 'next action' as a single tap; every nudge self-retires once a job exists, so veterans never see it. NO modal wizard, NO forced steps, NO hijacking the screen on Master load. THE STATE CHAIN (mutually exclusive, first match wins, rendered in today_render's empty branch): (1) No site profile → existing first-run gate, unchanged. (2) Profile set, no Master loaded → NOW-tab nudge 'Load your Master to begin' + LOAD MASTER button routing showPage('master')+master_loadFile(); the MASTER tab's own empty state already carries the load CTA. (3) Master loaded + ZERO deployments ever (gated on deploy_loadAll().length===0, NOT active-count, so a completed job does not re-trigger it) → dismissible 'Master loaded — scope your first job?' + SCOPE A JOB → mscope_open(), with a DISMISS that sets one device-scoped flag phantom_guided_scope_dismissed_v1 (guided_scopeDismissed/guided_dismissScope helpers) so it never auto-shows again. (4) Scope staged, not created → the existing v1.6.89 resume banner is the nudge, unchanged. (5) Deployment at 0% with no in-context rack → the ACTIVE BUILD hero now points at the deployment's FIRST rack (deploy_loadRacks[0]) and relabels to 'START BUILD →' / 'START RACK <rackId>' so the next tap opens the Rack Map and starts the build instead of a detail screen (reuses the existing hero next-action surface — no parallel system; display prefers rack.rackId, action still uses rack.id). (6) Anything else → silence. ALSO IN SCOPE — persistent SCOPE A JOB button added to the master_renderLoaded header row beside Replace/PIN (green, reuses .master-banner-replace), visible whenever a Master is loaded, routes to mscope_open(); the Category-3 nudge is just its one-time spotlight. This collapses the MASTER→BUILD→New-Deployment walk to one tap from where the user already is. HARD CONSTRAINTS honored: Master load NEVER auto-launches a flow (reference use stays instant); every nudge is one line + one tap, state-gated, dismissible where marked; zero modals/step-counters/'complete setup to continue'; techs who never deploy can dismiss. Reuses existing components (empty-state shell, pt-btn, master-banner-replace) — NO new CSS (block-0 braces 2494, zero delta). Snapshot/freeze, deployment creation, reconcile machinery untouched — this ship is empty-states + one button + one dismissible prompt. Built in Claude Code on a418e5c (v1.6.95); web-Claude does post-merge parity review (one-builder rule). Browser end-to-end walkthrough pending operator (fresh-device guided rail end-to-end + veteran silence + dismiss-persistence + SCOPE A JOB present/absent). Three stamps at v1.6.96.
